mapbox_styles.description: Available Mapbox map styles for Live Salesman Tracking System

streets.name: Streets
streets.description: A complete base map with roads, labels, and points of interest. Recommended for business applications.

satellite.name: Satellite
satellite.description: High-resolution satellite imagery without labels or roads.
satellite.use_case: Aerial view, terrain analysis, outdoor operations

satellite_streets.name: Satellite Streets
satellite_streets.description: Satellite imagery with roads and labels overlay.
satellite_streets.use_case: Hybrid view combining satellite imagery with navigation elements

outdoors.name: Outdoors
outdoors.description: A map style for outdoor activities with topographic features.
outdoors.use_case: Field operations, rural areas, outdoor sales territories

light.name: Light
light.description: A subtle, light-colored base map with minimal visual noise.
light.use_case: Data visualization, clean interface, minimal distraction

dark.name: Dark
dark.description: A dark base map for low-light environments or dark themes.
dark.use_case: Night mode, dark UI themes, reduced eye strain

navigation_day.name: Navigation Day
navigation_day.description: Optimized for turn-by-turn navigation during daytime.

navigation_night.name: Navigation Night
navigation_night.description: Optimized for turn-by-turn navigation during nighttime.

custom_colors.description: Customize map colors to match your brand

custom_fonts.description: Use custom fonts for map labels
